title: Wire a platform channel to native code
description: Define a MethodChannel contract, implement both native sides, and handle errors and missing platforms.
body: Steps: 1. Define a channel name and the method/argument contract shared by Dart and native. 2. On the Dart side, invoke methodChannel.invokeMethod with typed arguments and await the result. 3. Implement the handler on each native side (Kotlin/Java for Android, Swift/ObjC for iOS), returning results or errors via the result callback. 4. On Dart, catch PlatformException and MissingPluginException and branch per platform. 5. Test with a mock method-call handler. Rollback point: before shipping the native handler, since a Dart call to an unimplemented channel crashes. Validation: a mocked-channel test confirms success, native-error, and missing-plugin paths are all handled.
